colors.name: washi
colors.role: background — the paper every hour is burned on; all contrast figures are measured against it

colors.name: washi-aged
colors.role: plate paper, menu hover wash, the censer's lit rim — the page's older skin

colors.name: sumi
colors.role: the ink: primary text, wordmark, near mountains, the dark room's ground (14.4:1 on washi)

colors.name: ink-soft
colors.role: sumi thinned with water — all secondary text: kickers' JP, notes, captions, translations (7.1:1)

colors.name: smoke
colors.role: the smoke itself — canvas particles, far ridges, wash shadows; 3.1:1, so large or decorative only, never body text

colors.name: ember
colors.role: the live coal: seals, the censer tip, the button fill, focus rings in the dark room; 2.9:1 on washi (decorative there), 4.9:1 on sumi (text-safe in the dark)

colors.name: ember-deep
colors.role: the banked coal — ember that must function on washi: eyebrows, menu hours, focus ring, selection ground (4.7:1)

colors.name: gold
colors.role: gold leaf: the hero rule, censer rims, the plate sun; 2.5:1 — hairlines and objects, never text on washi

fonts.role: Latin voice — wordmark (500, tracked 0.16em), English koans (400), translations (italic); someone writing slowly with a good pen
every Japanese glyph — the vertical poem, blend names, seals; an old-style mincho whose strokes still remember the brush. Kanji fall through Garamond into it with no markup

texture: Washi in three static layers: (1) one fixed full-viewport SVG feTurbulence pass — fractalNoise baseFrequency 0.55, 2 octaves, seed 9 — mapped by feColorMatrix to sumi at ≤5% alpha and multiplied over everything (fibers, not film grain; it never animates); (2) a gold age-vignette, radial-gradient to rgba(176,141,74,0.09) at the edges; (3) laid lines — repeating-linear-gradient, 2px of rgba(28,24,20,0.012) every 7px. The plates add their own paper: washi-aged ground, 1px sumi-hairline mount, and a per-plate feTurbulence (baseFrequency ~0.01, 2 octaves) that exists only to feed the ink-settle displacement.

motion.name: ease-smoke
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) — every entrance: rises fast, settles long

motion.name: ease-ink
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1) — the loader lift and button fill: deliberate, weighted

motion.name: curl-field
motion.value: ψ = valueNoise(150px lattice) + 0.45·valueNoise(56px, ×1.35 anisotropy); v = (∂ψ/∂y, −∂ψ/∂x), ε = 2.5px, gain 1500 — divergence-free, so the smoke coils but never compresses

motion.name: field-rise
motion.value: 26 px/s — the noise field itself drifts upward, so eddies travel with the plume

motion.name: plume
motion.value: buoyancy 46 px/s · velocity relaxation 2.4 s⁻¹ (inertia, not obedience) · life 6.5–11 s · warmup 120 × 85 ms before first paint

motion.name: pointer-lean
motion.value: pull 1.1 px/s per px, capped ±54 px/s; energy attack 0.055 / release 0.018 per 60fps frame — quick to notice a hand, slow to forget it

motion.name: scroll-lag
motion.value: smoothed at 6.5 s⁻¹ toward 210 px/s per px/ms of scroll velocity, capped ±190; samples older than 140 ms read as stopped

motion.name: breeze
motion.value: 22·sin(0.21t) + 12·sin(0.47t + 1.9) px/s — two periods (~30 s, ~13 s) with no common divisor

motion.name: glyph-cadence
motion.value: 1150ms ease-smoke per glyph; wordmark 110ms/letter, poem 60ms/glyph with 620ms/column — the tick of the incense clock

motion.name: ink-settle
motion.value: feDisplacementMap scale 110 → 0 over 1900ms, cubic ease-out, driven by rAF setAttribute; turbulence itself never changes

motion.name: reveal
motion.value: 900ms ease-smoke, translateY(18px) → 0, 90ms stagger per observer batch

motion.name: loader
motion.value: seal press 700ms, hold 1450ms, paper lift 650ms ease-ink — skippable by any key, tap, wheel, or scroll; absent under reduced motion

motion.name: ambient
motion.value: ember breath 5.6s, hint drift 7.4s — mutually prime, opacity/transform only
